title: Knowledge Distillation of Black-Box Large Language Models
abstract: This is your secret weapon to shrink and speed up large language models! Ever struggled with a笨拙的大模型说话慢悠悠？Now, with the "Knowledge Distillation" tool, you can transfer the heavy knowledge into a nimble new model. Just like condensing a thick history book into a portable summary—enjoy intelligent conversations anytime, anywhere! Exactly what you've been missing!
abstract_zh: 这可是一个能让你的大模型小一点、快一点的秘密武器！你有没有试过一个庞然大物的对话模型，说话慢悠悠的？现在有了这个“知识精炼”工具，可以把那些沉甸甸的知识轻巧地转移到小巧玲珑的新模型上。就像把一本厚重的历史书浓缩成一份便携式摘要，让你随时随地都能享受智能对话的乐趣！这不就是你想要的嘛！
